name: pedigree-fhir
description: Headless TypeScript library for displaying, generating, and managing proband-centered pedigree charts from FHIR resources.

scripts.release:check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build && pnpm -F @pedigree/storybook build && pnpm -F @pedigree/docs build && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_SERVER=false pnpm e2e
scripts.release:pack: rm -rf .release-tmp && mkdir -p .release-tmp && pnpm --dir packages/core pack --pack-destination ../../.release-tmp && pnpm --dir packages/react pack --pack-destination ../../.release-tmp
scripts.mutation: pnpm run mutation:core && pnpm run mutation:react
